Then radiant armor if there are mages like Cyclops who can deal continues damage. If they are burst damage type mages then use Athena's shield. After that, you can use Chastise Pauldron if their Marksman are  relying on their attack speed. But if they are the marksman who deals critical damage, it's better to use blade armor.

data.title: Phoveus top 3 ph guide! Effective for beginners

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Phoveus is a tank fighter so supports like angela and floryn are great. They provide you high hp regeneration.

counters.counter_desc: Xborg has true damage and also high survability by lifesteal. He easily melt phoveus like butter.

dominants.dominant_desc: Phoveus is weak hero until reach level 4. In the lane stage, if your enemy is stronger than you, you should stay under the tower and ******** minions safely. In turtle fights, you are very strong and you should use this. You should zone enemy jungler and keep your jungler safe. In late game if enemy is stronger than you, you should play with your team. Phoveus has low attack speed so you don't try split alone in late game.

emblems.emblem_desc: This all amblems provide high sustain and survivability. But maybe you can prefer tank emblem for more sustain.  And maybe you can choose concussive blast for third emblem slot to more damage but I don't recommend it.

equips.equip_desc: İf your team has too many antiheal items, you can don't buy dominance ice; or your team hasn't any antiheal items, you can buy it earlier. And if your enemy has attack speed adc, you can buy blade armor.

hero.hero_overview: Phoveus is a very strong EXP lane hero. He easily dominate team fights especially in the early turtle fights.
hero.hero_strength: Phoveus is a very over powered hero against the heavy-dash heroes like joy, harith and lancelot. Because when they use their dash skills, phoveus' skills' cooldown are reduce.
hero.hero_weakness: Phoveus maybe weak against high crowd control heroes like franco (especially hook and flicker combo into under the tower), kaja. And he weak against true damage heroes like alpha, xborg and karrie. An extra choice he very weak against minsitthar cause of his ultimate. Because phoveus doesnt use his ultimate into the minsitthar ultimate.

data.recommend: Best for those who want to specialize in Phoveus.

spell.spell_desc: You usually should choose vengeance because when phoveus in team fight, his vengeance benefits him especially against attack speed ad-carries like miya and irithel. But when enemy has burst damages like kadita and lesley, you should choose flicker to escape and chase the enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Hard to kill due to it's sustainability

dominants.dominant_desc: At early you need to distance yourself since you don't have enough sustainability or damage deoending on your foe. Better to play safe than aggressive. Wait til you got your ult or first item before engaging. At 8minutes use encourage blessing stack it til the passive is active asking how? Teamfights and assists once it activates the passive the ganks would be more effective since yoy are a sustain hero not enough damage the passive of the blessing will give your teammates an extra damage .

emblems.emblem_desc: To get sustainability at the early game

equips.equip_desc: The roam boots should be on 8 minute mark since you will be building sustain you need encourage blessing so your team mate will have extra damage when ganking you or on teamfight, war axe and BF is a great combo since it both stack attack damage, SP will give you an advantage while using your ult to secure kill athena for mage and Immo or you can change it to diff defense item if you're confident you're tanky enough
